title: Documentary Campsite Couple Film Still AI
sourceTitle: Documentary Campsite Couple Film Still AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-photoreal documentary film still built around young couple in their early 20s with real unretouched faces and quiet shared smile, forest campsite near Istanbul at night with warm campfire, lantern glow, cool moonlight, tent, dirt, leaves, and faint Milky Way, and one person peering through a compact travel telescope on a tripod while the other points at a star cluster. Subject: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Scene: forest campsite near Istanbul at night with warm campfire, lantern glow, cool moonlight, tent, dirt, leaves, and faint Milky Way creates the forest campsite near Istanbul with tent, dirt, leaves, small camp clutter, campfire warmth, lantern glow, moonlit edges, and a faint Milky Way hint. Composition: one person peering through a compact travel telescope on a tripod while the other points at a star cluster; fixed 4:5 portrait orientation, eye-level handheld framing, slightly off-center documentary composition, and natural low-light imperfections. Signature Elements: The template identity is the telescope stargazing gesture, shoulder-touch intimacy, fire-and-moon mixed lighting, near-Istanbul forest campsite, and quiet real night atmosphere. Style: Ultra-photoreal documentary film still with subtle 35mm film grain, halation on fire highlights, natural low-light noise, real night air, quiet wonder, and intimate realism. Color Palette: Fixed warm orange campfire and lantern glow on faces, cool moonlight and sky fill on edges, deep detailed shadows, forest greens, earth browns, and faint star-field blue. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Eye-level handheld 4:5 portrait framing, slightly off-center, natural lens perspective, documentary low-light realism, and modest depth of field. Materials: compact travel telescope, tripod, small tent, camp clutter, visible cold breath, dirt, leaves, fire halation, and low-light noise remain tactile: compact telescope, tripod, campfire, lantern, tent fabric, dirt, leaves, cold breath, clothing texture, and forest ground clutter. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Documentary Campsite Couple Film Still Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-photoreal documentary film still built around intimate young adult couple with natural faces, shoulders touching, and subtle wonder in their expressions, quiet pine campsite outside Istanbul with orange firelight, small lantern, cool moonlit trees, tent shadow, damp leaves, and faint stars, and one partner adjusting the compact telescope while the other points upward toward a small star cluster. Subject: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Scene: quiet pine campsite outside Istanbul with orange firelight, small lantern, cool moonlit trees, tent shadow, damp leaves, and faint stars creates the forest campsite near Istanbul with tent, dirt, leaves, small camp clutter, campfire warmth, lantern glow, moonlit edges, and a faint Milky Way hint. Composition: one partner adjusting the compact telescope while the other points upward toward a small star cluster; fixed 4:5 portrait orientation, eye-level handheld framing, slightly off-center documentary composition, and natural low-light imperfections. Signature Elements: The template identity is the telescope stargazing gesture, shoulder-touch intimacy, fire-and-moon mixed lighting, near-Istanbul forest campsite, and quiet real night atmosphere. Style: Ultra-photoreal documentary film still with subtle 35mm film grain, halation on fire highlights, natural low-light noise, real night air, quiet wonder, and intimate realism. Color Palette: Fixed warm orange campfire and lantern glow on faces, cool moonlight and sky fill on edges, deep detailed shadows, forest greens, earth browns, and faint star-field blue. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Eye-level handheld 4:5 portrait framing, slightly off-center, natural lens perspective, documentary low-light realism, and modest depth of field. Materials: travel telescope, tripod legs, camp mugs, tent fabric, leaf-covered ground, smoke haze, fire highlights, and natural film grain remain tactile: compact telescope, tripod, campfire, lantern, tent fabric, dirt, leaves, cold breath, clothing texture, and forest ground clutter. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
